凌夜穿越鬼灭世界，开局绑定全能好感度系统！
原本以为要苦哈哈的杀鬼，结果画风突变？
只要和剧情美女互动，就能获得逆天奖励！
给祢豆子喂糖，奖励【日之呼吸·圆满】！
帮蝴蝶忍试药，奖励【万毒不侵体质】！
送香奈乎弹珠，奖励【通透世界·神级】！
……
鬼舞辻无惨： “求求你别秀了！我晒太阳还不行吗？那把赫刀烫死鬼了！”
黑死牟： “在他的剑术面前，我感觉自己像个拿烧火棍的婴儿。”
蝴蝶忍： “凌夜这个混蛋！不准再对别的女孩子笑了！”
炼狱杏寿郎： “唔！凌夜大哥的饭！好吃！好吃！好吃！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od9dfead796e6d4dc4ddeddff7cdb74ed~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"红中也","author_id":"","book_id":"7604768918879603774","book_name":"鬼灭：系统不正经！开局撩祢豆子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7604889891100426814","read_count":"14594","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"293028"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_cou
